hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); if [ "$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.stop_hook_active')" = 'true' ]; then exit 0; fi; if [ -f .ai-flow.json ] && grep -q '"linearSync".*true' .ai-flow.json && [ -f .ai-flow-sync-needed ]; then echo 'A flow phase completed but Linear has not been synced. Run /flow-linear-sync before ending.' >&2; exit 2; else exit 0; fi
